consolidated.headline: Window 13:36Z->15:45Z was a fix-and-verify window, not a trading one: NO trades closed. The orphan-labeling, reconciler-close sl/tp classification, and ping silent-loss fixes were merged AND deployed to the live VM, and the orphan fix was VERIFIED on live data (a post-deploy dry/shadow package came back 'rejected', not 'orphaned'). System healthy: heartbeat live, 36 strategies, deployed current. Grading is current (2498 graded). The prior report's CAUTION (orphaning + reconciler mislabeling) is now RESOLVED.

operator_priorities.title: Optional: add GRADING_PAT secret for unattended grading auto-merge
operator_priorities.detail: The grade-order-packages bridge opens a grades PR each run; without a GRADING_PAT (fine-grained PAT, contents+PR write) it can't auto-merge (GITHUB_TOKEN PRs get no CI), so a session adopts the branch. One secret makes grading fully hands-off.

operator_priorities.title: Residual orphan class: executed-then-exchange-flat-without-a-clean-fill
operator_priorities.detail: The dry/shadow orphan share is fixed; BL-20260601-001's remaining scope (executed positions that read flat with no recoverable fill/PnL) is the reconciler/closed-pnl-recovery domain — a separate follow-up.

operator_priorities.title: Add /api/bot/ml/status (+strategies, prop) to the vm-diag relay allowlist
operator_priorities.detail: These read-only endpoints aren't on the relay's path allowlist, so ML registry detail can't be pulled over the issue relay. A one-line allowlist add restores full report coverage.

cross_review_notes: This window DEPLOYED + LIVE-VERIFIED the fixes from the prior report's findings: orphan-labeling (pkg-7d5d8b394bc04502 -> 'rejected', not 'orphaned'), reconciler-close sl/tp classification (+ a reduce-leg mislabel regression caught via live data and fixed before it mattered), and the ping silent-loss hardening. The prior report's CAUTION is resolved.
No trades closed in-window; real money flat. The 24h real PnL (-$9.51, 3 trades) is unchanged from the prior report — no new real-money activity. Paper -$4285/24h (never blended).
Read-first is now mechanically enforced (SessionStart hook injects the read-first + work-session + definition-of-done contract at every session start, incl. compaction resumes).
Market: BTC chopping ~62.3k (62505->62308 over the window, ~-0.4%); no actionable breakouts — consistent with the quiet trading window.
